function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 20-03-2026 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) as attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification: attachment path was previously read, single attachment so ordering is trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email, no forwarded text requirement, and subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next remove processed inbox file per workflow.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md without write-time errors.

next_step.current_state: All required actions complete: processed lowest inbox item, verified identity, drafted resend email with correct attachment, and deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing an outbound draft reply to Claudia with the requested 2026-03-20 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree -> AGENTS -> context), inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, applied processing-inbox-email canonical header rules, verified sender against cast primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox record, and deleted inbox file only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email frontmatter sender (claudia@helios-tax.example) matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md, requested invoice dated 2026-03-20 was found at 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md, and an outbound draft was recorded in 60_outbox/outbox with that exact attachment before deleting the processed inbox item.
